name: Catfish & Crawfish Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the catfish and crawfish in a food processor.
2. Add the wine, chopped parsley, lemon juice, and salt to the fish mixture. Mix well.
3. Stir in the Louisiana hot sauce and Lea & Perrins Worcestershire sauce.
4. Fold in the cream cheese until fully incorporated.
5. Place the mixture into a mold and refrigerate overnight.
6. Serve with crackers or on a bed of lettuce. Shrimp can be used if crawfish are unavailable.
